changelog: Live player: subtle 'Reconnecting…' pill appears in the top-left corner the moment the auto-reconnect watchdog kicks off recovery (error / 4 s buffer stall / live STATE_ENDED). Auto-dismisses when the picture is back or after 8 s as a safety net. Tells users the freeze isn't on their end — the app is already handling it.
All v1.44.62 features still in place (full source rebuild on recovery, STATE_ENDED handling, tightened stall thresholds).
